description: Sister mentioned across 3 different days/topics with contradictory context

messages.speaker: User 1
messages.text: My sister is coming to visit next week! I'm so excited, we haven't seen each other in months. She's planning to stay for the whole weekend.
messages.full_text: User 1: My sister is coming to visit next week! I'm so excited, we haven't seen each other in months. She's planning to stay for the whole weekend.

messages.speaker: User 2
messages.text: That sounds wonderful! What are you planning to do together?
messages.full_text: User 2: That sounds wonderful! What are you planning to do together?

messages.speaker: User 1
messages.text: We're going to explore the city and try that new restaurant downtown. My sister loves Italian food!
messages.full_text: User 1: We're going to explore the city and try that new restaurant downtown. My sister loves Italian food!

messages.speaker: User 1
messages.text: Bad news... my sister's trip got cancelled. Something came up at her work and she can't make it anymore. I'm really disappointed.
messages.full_text: User 1: Bad news... my sister's trip got cancelled. Something came up at her work and she can't make it anymore. I'm really disappointed.

messages.speaker: User 2
messages.text: Oh no, that's too bad! Maybe she can reschedule?
messages.full_text: User 2: Oh no, that's too bad! Maybe she can reschedule?

messages.speaker: User 1
messages.text: I doubt it. My sister said her schedule is packed for the next few months. It's really frustrating.
messages.full_text: User 1: I doubt it. My sister said her schedule is packed for the next few months. It's really frustrating.

messages.speaker: User 1
messages.text: Had a big argument with my sister yesterday. Things got really heated. She said some hurtful things and now we're not talking.
messages.full_text: User 1: Had a big argument with my sister yesterday. Things got really heated. She said some hurtful things and now we're not talking.

messages.speaker: User 2
messages.text: I'm sorry to hear that. What happened?
messages.full_text: User 2: I'm sorry to hear that. What happened?

messages.speaker: User 1
messages.text: It was about the cancelled visit honestly. I told my sister I felt like she doesn't prioritize our relationship. Now I regret saying that.
messages.full_text: User 1: It was about the cancelled visit honestly. I told my sister I felt like she doesn't prioritize our relationship. Now I regret saying that.

topic_checkpoints.summary: User 1 is excited about their sister coming to visit. Planning to explore the city and try Italian food together. Positive and anticipatory mood.
User 1's sister had to cancel her visit due to work commitments. User 1 is disappointed and frustrated. Sister's schedule is packed for months.
User 1 had a heated argument with their sister about the cancelled visit. Said hurtful things about priorities. Now regretting it and not speaking.
